programme.desc: The '56 Chevy Field Car gets ready for the drag strip.

programme.title: Roadkill Garage
programme.desc: Freiburger and Dulcich give some much-needed love to the '69 Chevy Crusher Impala by way of a new 9-inch rear and a suspension overhaul. They also fix a major throttle issue that unlocks the 498 big block before hitting the road for monster burnouts.

programme.title: Roadkill Garage
programme.desc: Freiburger and Dulcich tune up the supercharged big block in the '69 Crusher Impala at Westech's dyno before hitting the road and the dragstrip. The guys run the Impala's fastest time in the quarter mile, but discover some new Roadkill-level issues.

programme.desc: Steve Dulcich and Wiley Stevens up the cam game on the Off-Road Challenger, while also seeing if Wiley's '06 Subaru can be made into a rally-capable daily driver with suspension and airflow upgrades.

programme.title: Roadkill Garage

programme.title: Roadkill Garage

programme.title: Roadkill Garage

programme.desc: A client loves her trucks, particularly the 1950 Chevy, but with a list of customizations the size of Texas, this build is going to seriously test Joe's mechanical genius.

programme.title: Iron Resurrection
programme.desc: Mandi stumbles across a 1971 Volkswagen Karmann Ghia, and challenges her husband, Joe, to make the car cool.

programme.title: Iron Resurrection
programme.desc: A weather-beaten 1959 Metro rolls into the shop for an extreme makeover from the inside out; the vehicle's new owner gets a surprise twist.

programme.title: Iron Resurrection
programme.desc: Known for its sizzling performance and smooth body style, the 1969 Pontiac GTO is one of the fastest cars of its time; now, Joe gives it his signature twist with body modifications and a new power train that will have its wide tires smoking hot.

programme.title: Bitchin' Rides
programme.desc: A repeat client and collaborator's new project for Kindig It is a 1927 Shadow Rod; a 2017 Bentley Bentayga receives some styling upgrades.

programme.title: Bitchin' Rides
programme.desc: Tad Leach is eager to have his dream car built by Kindig It Design; Dave goes big on the build of a rare 1958 Lincoln Continental; the upholstery shop updates the seats and headliner on a rare 1969 McLaren.

programme.title: Bitchin' Rides
programme.desc: The Continental build continues; the vehicle receives a custom blue color, massive V12 engine, and the green light from a living legend; Dave wants a new car hauler and enlists RMD Garage to help.

programme.title: Bitchin' Rides
programme.desc: Kevin and Dave gear up for the Back to the 50's car show in St. Paul, Minn.; Dave runs a sweepstakes to raise money for charity, awarding the 1929 roadster to one lucky contestant.

programme.title: Bitchin' Rides
programme.desc: The metal masters take on a 1967 Chevelle with Great 8 pedigree and high expectations; Dave learns the hard way that builds do not always go according to plan.

programme.title: Bitchin' Rides
programme.desc: The entire Kindig family works hard to convert a '57 Corvette into a bitchin' ride as a retirement gift for Charity's father, but getting the kids motivated to help is easier said than done; a 1967 Malibu's AC is repaired.

programme.title: Bitchin' Rides
programme.desc: The shop pulls out all the stops to take home the gold at the last car show of the season; the Fairlane and the Nomad receive extra attention; Dave and Kevin check out the best vehicles in Reno.

programme.title: Bitchin' Rides
programme.desc: A '32 roadster is secretly purchased for a client's wife and shipped to Kindig It Design for mechanical upgrades and styling changes; Dave redesigns a 2004 Hummer.

programme.title: Bitchin' Rides
programme.desc: Dave is tasked with finding and transforming a 1967 Pontiac GTO for a secret client from South Africa; Dave buys back one of his first builds, a Volkswagen Karmann Ghia, but does not know what he will do with it when he gets it back on the road.

programme.title: Bitchin' Rides
programme.desc: Final details on the 1967 Pontiac GTO include tanzanite blue paint, redline wheels and a custom interior; a Chevelle arrives for a small but poignant upgrade.

programme.title: Bitchin' Rides
programme.desc: Dave and the team at Kindig It Design start a new year with a one-of-a-kind build they have never attempted before, a 1964 Ranchero; the car looks to have had a lot of work done, but what's underneath the metal sets the team back.

programme.title: Bitchin' Rides
programme.desc: The Ranchero build is an epic achievement for Dave and the whole Kindig It Design team, but they hope the client sees it the same way; Dave seeks the perfect name for the perfect car.

programme.title: Bitchin' Rides
programme.desc: A Canadian father-daughter team arrives to add a new ride to their impressive collection; building the little sister to the '62 Safari Bus is something close to Dave's VW roots; fresh off the showroom floor, a 2017 Cadillac CTSV.

programme.title: Bitchin' Rides
programme.desc: Dave and the team swap the chassis in a 1955 Nomad and upgrade its performance, which will give this car the edge it was missing.

programme.desc: Celebrating small but mighty animal warriors armed with sheaves of scary weapons; admiring nutrias' stink bombs; honey badgers' needlelike choppers; black-tailed gulls' razor-sharp beaks; the killer talons on dive-bombing peregrine falcons.

programme.desc: Tasmanian devils get into food fights with rivals; how dung beetles roll over the competition; wild boars' fierce mating strategies; hyenas' bone-crushing teeth demolish any meal.

programme.title: Big Cats About the House

programme.desc: Compilation of silent film shorts about Christmas.

programme.title: The Man I Love

programme.title: Larceny, Inc.

programme.title: Backfire
programme.desc: A World War II veteran (Gordon MacRae) and his nurse (Virginia Mayo) search for his buddy (Edmond O'Brien), a reformed hoodlum on the run.

programme.title: Period of Adjustment
programme.desc: George (Jim Hutton) and Isabel (Jane Fonda) marry and plan to stop to see Ralph and his wife, Dorothea, on the way to Florida. When they arrive and see the tension between Ralph and Dorothea, they try to help patch up the troubled marriage.

programme.title: Holiday Affair
programme.desc: A war widow (Janet Leigh) has a 6-year-old son, and two men (Robert Mitchum, Wendell Corey) who want to marry her for Christmas.

programme.title: Desk Set

programme.title: Meet John Doe

programme.desc: An insurance sleuth (Dennis O'Keefe) probes a small-town suicide, senses hostility and suspects murder.

programme.title: Carol for Another Christmas
programme.desc: Three ghosts visit a bitter man (Sterling Hayden) who has never recovered from losing his son during World War II.

programme.title: Three Godfathers

programme.title: Star in the Night
programme.desc: The owner of a motel helps a couple on Christmas Eve.

programme.desc: A St. Louis lawyer's (Leon Ames) family (Judy Garland, Margaret O'Brien) stays in town for the 1904 World's Fair.

programme.title: The Batman
programme.desc: Batman ventures into Gotham City's underworld when a sadistic killer leaves behind a trail of cryptic clues. As the scale of the perpetrator's plans become clear, he must bring justice to the abuse of power and corruption that plagues the metropolis.

programme.title: The Transporter
programme.desc: A mercenary (Jason Statham) changes his mind-set after the package he is supposed to deliver turns out to be a gagged woman (Shu Qi).

programme.title: DC League of Super-Pets
programme.desc: Krypto the Super-Dog must convince a ragtag group of animals to master their own newfound powers to help him save Superman and the rest of the Justice League.

programme.title: Playmobil: The Movie
programme.desc: Magically transported to the fantastical world of Playmobil, a teen joins forces with a bumbling secret agent and an adventurous truck driver to save her captive brother from an evil emperor.

programme.title: Nancy Drew and the Hidden Staircase
programme.desc: Modern, smart, and independent, Nancy Drew reluctantly befriends Helen, the local mean girl, and together they investigate the haunting of Twin Elms.

programme.title: I Am Number Four
programme.desc: One of nine living on Earth, an alien (Alex Pettyfer) with extraordinary abilities poses as an ordinary teenager in the hope of evading those sent to kill him.

programme.title: Pokémon Detective Pikachu
programme.desc: A young man joins forces with Detective Pikachu to unravel the mystery behind his father's disappearance. Chasing clues through the streets of Ryme City, the dynamic duo soon discover a devious plot that poses a threat to the Pokémon universe.

programme.title: The LEGO Movie 2
programme.desc: The citizens of Bricksburg face a dangerous new threat when LEGO DUPLO invaders from outer space start to wreck everything. It's now up to Emmet, Lucy, Batman and their friends to defeat the giant marauders and restore harmony to the LEGO universe.

programme.title: Percy Jackson & the Olympians: The Lightning Thief
programme.desc: After learning he is the son of Poseidon, a youth (Logan Lerman) must prevent a war among the gods and rescue his mother from Hades, king of the underworld.

programme.title: Percy Jackson: Sea of Monsters
programme.desc: To find the magic Golden Fleece and save Camp Half-Blood, demigod Percy (Logan Lerman) and his friends undertake a dangerous odyssey into the area known to humans as the Bermuda Triangle.

programme.title: Night at the Museum
programme.desc: A night watchman (Ben Stiller) at a museum of natural history discovers that exhibits come alive after the building closes.

programme.title: Night at the Museum: Battle of the Smithsonian
programme.desc: Larry Daley (Ben Stiller) joins forces with Teddy Roosevelt (Robin Williams), Amelia Earhart (Amy Adams) and others to prevent four of history's worst villains from conquering the world.

programme.title: Night at the Museum: Secret of the Tomb
programme.desc: Upon learning that the museum's magic is disappearing, night watchman Larry Daley (Ben Stiller) sets out on an epic quest to the British Museum in London to save his friends one last time.

programme.title: Stuber
programme.desc: After crashing his car, a cop who's recovering from eye surgery recruits an Uber driver to help him catch a heroin dealer. The mismatched pair soon find themselves in for a wild day of stakeouts and shootouts as they encounter the city's seedy side.

programme.title: Code 8
programme.desc: A desperate young man possessing special powers clashes with a police force after committing a petty crime.

programme.title: Midway
programme.desc: On June 4, 1942, the Japanese navy plans a strike against American ships in the Pacific. For the next three days, the U.S. Navy and a squad of brave fighter pilots engage the enemy in one of the most important and decisive battles of World War II.

programme.title: Reign of Fire
programme.desc: A hotshot American (Matthew McConaughey) and a firefighter (Christian Bale) unite to fight a horde of dragons in post-apocalyptic London.
